stories.title: PH-01 fixture for B1 smoke-test integration AC

acceptanceCriteria.description: F36-source-tree-grep violation: greps the source tree instead of verifying observable behavior. ac-lint flags this at shape time; smoke-runner emits skipped-suspect without executing.

Intentionally hung command — sleeps past the default 30s timeout so smokeExecute reports hungOnTimeout=true and the runner classifies as 'hung'. Uses 40s to sit comfortably outside the 30s default budget without wasting too much test wall-clock.
Clean fast command as a control — should classify as 'ok' and prove the fixture exercises the happy path alongside the two failure modes.
